drl:
rule "R0"
when
    T1($b0_0_0 : f0)
    T2(f2 < $b0_0_0, $b0_1_0 : f0, $b0_1_1 : f3)
    not T1(f0 in (3))
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
end
rule "R1"
salience -5
when
    $p1_0 : T2($b1_0_0 : f2)
then
    delete($p1_0);
end
rule "R2"
when
    accumulate( T1(f0 != -2.0, $s2_0 : f0); $a2_0 : average($s2_0) )
    accumulate( T3($s2_1 : f1); $a2_1 : collectSet($s2_1) )
    T1(f0 >= 9 && < -1000000007, f0 * 3 >= 2, $b2_2_0 : f0, $b2_2_1 : f0)
then
end
rule "R3"
when
    T1($b3_0_0 : f0)
    $p3_1 : T2(f2 < $b3_0_0, $b3_1_0 : f0, $b3_1_1 : f3)
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
    insertLogical(new T3(false, $p3_1.getF0(), $p3_1.isF3()));
end
rule "R4"
salience($b4_1_0 - 1)
agenda-group "gb"
when
    T1($b4_0_0 : f0)
    $p4_1 : T2(f2 < $b4_0_0, $b4_1_0 : f0, $b4_1_1 : f3)
then
    insertLogical(new T3(false, 1.0, $p4_1.isF3()));
    insertLogical(new T3(false, 3.0, $b4_1_1));
end
name: pr_nl_fz_337002_1104
